title: The Great Divide
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, Benjamin Glazer, William Vaughn Moody
actors: Alice Terry, Conway Tearle, Wallace Beery
plot: Alone and unprotected in an isolated wilderness cabin, Ruth Jordan is discovered by three drunken brutes who begin to barter for her. In desperation, she appeals to Stephen Ghent, the least degraded of the desperadoes, promising h...
